public class SlotDeclaration = (
|
public header ::= 0.
public name
public mixin
public metadata
|
)

(* squeak compatibility *)
protected Error = (
	^outer KernelForPrimordialSoup Exception
)

public class ArgumentError value: v = Exception (|
	argument = v.
|)

public class VMO handle: h = ZirconObject handle: h (
)

public class Socket handle: h = ZirconObject handle: h (
)

public class Channel handle: h = ZirconObject handle: h (|
private onReadable_
private onClose_
|)

public class Timer wrapping: i = (|
	private internalTimer = i.
|)

class TimerHeap = (|
private table ::= Array new: 32.
private	used ::= 0.
private nextId ::= 0.
|)

class Ref wrapping: ref = Proxy (|
protected internalRef = ref.
|internalRefs at: self put: ref)

public class Port fromId: i = (|
public id = i.
public handler
|)

public new = (
	|
	id = createPort.
	port = self fromId: id.
	|
	portMap at: id put: port.
	^port
)

class MessageLoop = (|
	public application
	public platform
	public handleMap = Map new.
|)

class InternalNearRef wrapping: t = InternalRef (|
protected target = t.
|)

class InternalBrokenRef problem: p = InternalRef (|
protected problem = p.
|)

(* The day of the week in [1, 7]. *)
public weekday ^<Integer> = ( ^parts at: 7 )

(* The second of the minute in [0, 59]. *)
public second ^<Integer> = ( ^parts at: 1 )

(* The month in [1, 12]. *)
public month ^<Integer> = ( ^parts at: 5 )

(* The minute of the hour in [0, 59]. *)
public minute ^<Integer> = ( ^parts at: 2 )

(* The hour of the day in [0, 23]. *)
public hour ^<Integer> = ( ^parts at: 3 )

(* The day of the month in [1, 31]. *)
public day ^<Integer> = ( ^parts at: 4 )

replaceSource: source = (
	nil = source ifTrue: [^nil].
	keepSource ifTrue: [^source].
	^0
)

class StringCluster = (|
noncanonical = List new.
canonical = List new.
|)

preRegisterRef: object = (
	refs at: object put: nextRefIndex.
	nextRefIndex:: nextRefIndex + 1.
)

registerRef: object = (
	refs at: nextRefIndex put: object.
	nextRefIndex:: 1 + nextRefIndex.
)

class Kernel wrapping: k = (|
private internalKernel = k.
|)
public class WorldSubject onModel: m = Subject onModel: m ()
class WorldPresenter onSubject: s = Presenter onSubject: s ()

class TextDisplayFragment text: t = LeafFragment (|
	textX ::= t.
|)

class StaticLabelFragment text: t = LeafFragment (|
	textX ::= t.
	public color
|)

class StaticImageFragment image: i = LeafFragment (|
	image = i.
|)

class RowComposer definitions: fs <List[Fragment]> = SequenceComposer definitions: fs (
)
class NavigationHistory = (| nextId ::= 1. ids <Map[Presenter, Integer]> = Map new. |)

class HyperlinkImageFragment image: i action: a = LeafFragment (|
	image = i.
	action = a.
|)

public class Gradient from: a to: b = (|
	topColor = a.
	bottomColor = b.
|)

class ColorDecorator color: c <Color> = Decorator (
| color <Color> = c. |)

alien = a.
